headline: Pfizer Leans On Obesity And Immunology To Refresh Growth Story
summary: Pfizer received its first obesity drug approval in China for Severwin, opening a new market for the company. The company also reported promising Phase 2 results for tilrekimig, a trispecific antibody candidate in atopic dermatitis. Both updates highlight progress in obesity and chronic inflammatory disease programs within Pfizer's pipeline. Pfizer, listed as NYSE:PFE, is drawing fresh attention as it pairs new product approvals with clinical readouts in areas of high medical need. The stock...

headline: Pfizer’s Phase 2 Study of Trispecific Antibody Positive in Moderate to Severe Atopic Dermatitis
summary: NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced positive topline results from a Phase 2 study investigating tilrekimig (PF-07275315) in adults with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis. The study met its primary efficacy endpoint, demonstrating a statistically significant increase in the percentage of participants achieving EASI-75* (≥ 75% reduction in the Eczema Area and Severity Index) at Week 16, compared to placebo. headline: Roche Shares Fall After Breast-Cancer Treatment Misses Goal in Late-Stage Study
summary: Shares fell, wiping out year-to-date gains in the company’s stock after it said the combination of giredestrant with Pfizer’s Ibrance didn’t meet its primary objective.
